name: prompt-saver
description: Local offline prompt manager with floating quick-copy buttons
author: BG Coding

scripts.release:commit: git add -A && git commit -m "Prompt Saver 1.6.0: silent one-click updates, auto-update toggle"
scripts.release:publish: gh release create v1.6.0 src-tauri/target/release/prompt-saver.exe "src-tauri/target/release/bundle/nsis/Prompt Saver_1.6.0_x64-setup.exe" --title "Prompt Saver 1.6.0" --notes-file docs/release-notes.md
